stemHtml:
According to the AFM, the centre tank fuel has to be consumed prior to the wing tanks fuel. According to the pre-flight fuel planning, the remaining fuel upon landing will be 2000 kg. Given the following information below, calculate your CG position upon landing:

Zero Fuel Mass: 40 000 kg 
CG position at TOM: 15.45 m 
Fuel in centre tank at take-off: 28 000 kg 
Centre fuel tank station: 15.3 m 
Fuel in wing tanks at take-off: 26 000 kg 
Wing fuel tank station: 15.7 m
